consents_check.name: consents_check
consents_check.value: (household_id IS NOT NULL) OR (user_id IS NOT NULL)

medications_check.name: medications_check
medications_check.value: (ended_on IS NULL) OR (started_on IS NULL) OR (ended_on >= started_on)

idx_documents_expiry.name: idx_documents_expiry
idx_documents_expiry.where: ((expires_on IS NOT NULL) AND (deleted_at IS NULL))
